data.body: SCOPE UPDATE (adversarial review F1): merge-to-main.sh functional v2 code removal is now in scope for this story. Remove v2 .tickets/ patterns from case statements and glob patterns at lines 410, 462, 468, 492, 562, 577, 665, 1020, 1152. Per user decision during brainstorm: both v2 and v3 ticket path patterns should be removed from merge filters since v3 tickets are on the orphan branch and never appear in the worktree merge diff.
